title: You Cannot Spot This
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~10s. Featured brand: Glossier (real D2C beauty). Inspired by the @mobileeditingclub reel.
concept: The inspiration dares you to spot AI, then shows photoreal skin you cannot question. For Glossier, every model and every dewy close-up is generated with Masonry: same brand face, same glow, holding your products, no shoot and no studio. Same beat structure and length as the inspiration, fully original copy.
audio: Trending-style hook audio with a short spoken voice-over over a fast skin-close-up montage, cut on the beat. If you run it as audio-only, drop the voice-over and let the on-screen text plus the track carry the line.

beats.vo: You think you can spot AI.
beats.visual: Extreme close-up of a model looking straight to camera, dewy Glossier skin, soft daylight. Reads like a real campaign face, not a render.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration 0s, the I-can-spot-AI hook over a face.

beats.visual: Macro push into the cheek: real freckles, a glossy highlight on the cheekbone, true pores.
Macro on glossy lips with a Glossier Balm Dotcom sheen, fine lip texture visible.
Macro across the nose and cheek, lifelike texture and a faint natural flush.

beats.vo: Every one of these is Masonry.
beats.visual: Pull back to reveal a different model entirely, same dewy Glossier finish and palette.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration 4s, the next face in the montage.

beats.visual: A deeper-skin model with freckles, hand resting near the face, identical Glossier sheen.

beats.vo: Different model, different set, on brand every time.
beats.visual: Quick cut between two models in different light, the brand look stays consistent across both.

beats.vo: Holding your products. No shoot. No studio.
beats.visual: A model holds a Glossier Cloud Paint up near the face, generated, perfectly on brand.
A male model, photoreal stubble and skin, the same grade of realism and brand polish.

beats.vo: Comment GLOW and we will send the link.
beats.visual: End card: Glossier wordmark on a soft pink set, small made-with-Masonry credit.

notes: Demo brand is Glossier, a realistic stand-in for a D2C beauty client (swap in the actual client when producing). Every model, skin close-up and product-in-hand shot would be generated with Masonry; no media has been generated yet (generation is gated on separate approval). Keep total runtime within ~10s to match the reference. The source showed a generic AI-model workflow; the integration here is Masonry.
